pi_items.source: ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer documentation confirms 'Log Collection Failure Alerts' / 'Device Down Alert' has a minimum configurable interval of 30 minutes.
ManageEngine documentation refers to this feature using terms like 'Log Collection Failure Alerts' and 'Device Down Alert'.
Task instructions require the alert to be enabled.

privileged_info_summary: ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer has a built-in feature for 'Log Collection Failure' (also known as 'Device Down' alert). Official documentation confirms that the minimum configurable time threshold for this alert is exactly 30 minutes.
